hero.text: Believe in the magic of new beginnings.
hero.author: Anonymous

aries.general: A day filled with energy and enthusiasm awaits you. Seize every opportunity that comes your way.
aries.love: Romantic sparks could reignite your relationship; embrace the passion.
aries.career: A new project may arise, allowing you to showcase your skills. Step up!

taurus.general: A calm and serene day unfolds. Take time for self-care and relaxation.
taurus.love: Open communication brings harmony in your relationship today.
taurus.career: Focus on teamwork and collaboration; it will lead to success.

gemini.general: Curiosity may lead you to discover something new today. Stay open-minded.
gemini.love: A heart-to-heart discussion will strengthen your bond.
gemini.career: Networking can open doors; don't hesitate to reach out to old contacts.

cancer.general: A nurturing day ahead; it’s a great time to reconnect with loved ones.
cancer.love: Express your feelings openly; honesty will bring you closer to your partner.
cancer.career: Your creativity can shine; consider presenting new ideas to your team.

leo.general: You’re in the spotlight today; embrace your natural charm!
leo.love: A surprise romantic gesture will brighten your day.
leo.career: Take the lead on a project; your confidence will inspire others.

virgo.general: Organizing your space can lead to clarity in your thoughts today.
virgo.love: A thoughtful gift will speak volumes to your partner.
virgo.career: Attention to detail will win you praise from superiors.

libra.general: Balance is key today; find time for both work and play.
libra.love: A fun outing can bring you and your partner closer together.
libra.career: Collaboration will yield positive results; work harmoniously.

scorpio.general: An intense day where your passions may take center stage.
scorpio.love: Reignite the spark with a spontaneous romantic adventure.
scorpio.career: Trust your instincts when making important decisions at work.

sagittarius.general: Adventure awaits you; be ready to explore new horizons.
sagittarius.love: A shared experience can deepen your connection with someone special.
sagittarius.career: Embrace opportunities for travel or learning that may come your way.

capricorn.general: A focused day ahead; tackle your goals with determination.
capricorn.love: Patience will help you resolve any misunderstandings in your relationship.
capricorn.career: Your hard work will probably start paying off soon; stay committed.

aquarius.general: Innovative ideas can flow freely today; embrace your creativity.
aquarius.love: Connecting on a mental level will enhance your relationship.
aquarius.career: Consider unconventional solutions to challenges at work.

pisces.general: A reflective day where your intuition will guide you well.
pisces.love: Be open to expressing your inner feelings; it will strengthen bonds.
pisces.career: Your empathetic nature can help you mediate a team conflict.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
professional.author: Walt Disney

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
professional.author: Zig Ziglar

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
motivation.author: Confucius

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Anonymous

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Chase your dreams, not your fears.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Live for today, plan for tomorrow.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Take only memories, leave only footprints.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Embrace the glorious mess that you are.
captions.author: Elizabeth Gilbert

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: It's not a faith in technology. It's faith in people.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
tech.author: Alan Kay

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

fun.text: I’m on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won’t stop sending me beach wallpapers.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I would tell a joke about an elevator, but it’s an uplifting experience.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I used to play piano by ear, but now I use my hands.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I'm reading a book on anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down!
fun.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Do not lose hope, nor be sad.
faith.author: Quran

faith.text: Everything is possible for one who believes.
faith.author: Mark 9:23

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: Keep your faith in God, but keep your powder dry.
faith.author: Oliver Cromwell

faith.text: Faith is not about everything turning out okay; it's about being okay no matter how things turn out.
faith.author: Anonymous

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, the first step must always be to question everything.
wisdom.author: Anonymous

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward you get for a lifetime of listening when you'd have preferred to talk.
wisdom.author: Mark Twain
